name: SaveIN Fintech Pvt Ltd
rules_json: {"pre_click_js": "(async () => { const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=\"button\"], a')); const yearButtons = buttons.filter(b => /^20\\d{2}$/.test(b.textContent.trim())).sort((a,b) => parseInt(b.textContent) - parseInt(a.textContent)); const latestYear = yearButtons[0]; if (latestYear) { latestYear.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } const monthOrder = ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December']; const updatedButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=\"button\"], a')); const monthButtons = updatedButtons.filter(b => monthOrder.includes(b.textContent.trim())).sort((a,b) => monthOrder.indexOf(a.textContent.trim()) - monthOrder.indexOf(b.textContent.trim())); const latestMonth = monthButtons[monthButtons.length - 1]; if (latestMonth) latestMonth.click(); const monthDays = {January:31, February:28, March:31, April:30, May:31, June:30, July:31, August:31, September:30, October:31, November:30, December:31}; const dateStr = latestMonth && latestYear ? (monthDays[latestMonth.textContent.trim()] + ' ' + latestMonth.textContent.trim() + ' ' + latestYear.textContent.trim()) : ''; if (dateStr) { const dateDiv = document.createElement('div'); dateDiv.textContent = 'DLGDATE:' + dateStr; document.body.appendChild(dateDiv); } })()", "page_level": {"as_on_regex": "DLGDATE:([^<]+)"}, "field_map": {"portfolio": "DLG Set", "amount": "Cohort values under each DLG set (₹ Crores)"}}
